title: Villager Tannery House
description: Adds a Villager Tannery to the Plains and Forest biomes, with Leatherworker and Shepherd villagers working inside.
body:
This mod adds a Villager Tannery, where Leatherworker and Shepherd villagers work inside.

![House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/328fb12bafc1c57669fe5ea9d87bb9e61b57a415.jpeg)

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7838bebcfe74bc032929dd08fdc7494fd1d0160.jpeg)

You can also find some hidden loot related to their professions.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e23e1e8398a7c830f9754b6246053bc8b4f9655c.jpeg)

The house is fully decorated with detailed interiors.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/779e84f2621f044e91b57a56ff9bbaf6d3307d4f.jpeg)

This structure generates in Forest and Plains biomes in the Overworld.

**Feel free to put it in your modpack!**
